subject: CSV import missing field error
message: The importer rejected our CSV but did not tell us which required field was missing. We lost time guessing the right column names.

subject: Saved report should survive refresh
message: A PM saved an AI analysis but could not find it after switching workspaces. The report list should make workspace ownership clearer.

subject: Need metadata in feedback table
message: We import product reviews and need to keep verified purchase and helpful vote fields for later filtering.

subject: Workspace deletion left stale data
message: After deleting a test workspace, feedback records still appeared in exports. We need deletion to remove all workspace data.

subject: Ask AI cited wrong quote
message: The answer was useful, but one quote did not exactly match the original feedback text. We need stricter quote validation.

subject: Column mapping worked
message: The new mapping screen helped us import app review exports without renaming every column first.

subject: Need role-based report sharing
message: Our sales team wants to share saved reports externally, but product admins need approval controls first.

subject: Import preview too wide
message: The preview table is useful, but long pasted notes make the page hard to scan on smaller laptops.
